arts.ttl: I controversially quit Liverpool to join Man City for one major reason - I didn't regret it
arts.sum: Manchester City visit Liverpool in the Premier League this afternoon in a crunch clash at Anfield

arts.ttl: I wanted to leave Man City to win trophies - that's why I signed for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool host Manchester City on Sunday in the latest instalment of their rivalry

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer, new Conor Bradley role - Trent Alexander-Arnold Liverpool verdict given
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Amie Wilson, Isaac Seelochan, Isaac Johnson, Tom Coley)
arts.sum: Liverpool transfer news as Conor Bradley's most recent standout display leaves Trent Alexander-Arnold exit question to be answered

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Mo Salah contract verdict emerges as star reveals plans to join another club
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Manchester City to Anfield on Sunday with the two sides in very different form ahead of the Premier League clash but the Reds still have off-field issues to resolve

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo shares Liverpool dressing room's stance on Man City test - 'You cannot deny that'
arts.sum: Liverpool star Cody Gakpo says Arne Slot's Premier League leaders are ready to put on a show against reigning champions Manchester City at Anfield on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Why Arne Slot turned up the volume after Liverpool boss spotted what was happening at Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Arne Slot previews Sunday's visit from Manchester City as the Liverpool boss prepared to go up against Pep Guardiola for the first time in his career

arts.ttl: Fantasy Challenge: DOUBLE points for Man City and Liverpool stars
arts.sum: Though Onana failed to keep a clean sheet in Gameweek 12, he is still the highest-scoring goalkeeper in the game having registered 56 points this season, four more than Jordan Pickford (£4.9m) and Matz Sels (£4.7m), who are tied in second with 52. With Liverpool winning 11 of their opening 13 matches of the Premier League season, I believe they will beat Man City and go 11 points clear of them.

arts.ttl: Michel Platini claims that Kylian Mbappe is 'lost on the pitch' at Real Madrid but backs French star to respond following penalty miss against Liverpool
arts.sum: Mbappe has received much criticism for his performances for Real recently, especially with regards to his display in the Champions League defeat to Liverpool when he missed a penalty.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sports scar from Feyenoord capitulation as Manchester City boss sings during appearance at Barcelona's 125th anniversary gala
arts.sum: Barcelona stars of the past and present came together on Friday night to celebrate the 125th anniversary of the club but it was the appearance of Pep Guardiola that had everyone talking.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Alisson Becker confirms contract decision after shock Claudio Taffarel claim
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker shoots down talk of an exit from Anfield in 2025 as he outlines his desire to see out his contract.
